np.folderPicker.label: Choose this folder
np.name.title: Project name
np.name.prompt: Folder name and build target (letters, digits, - and _)
np.template.title: Starting template
np.template.hello.label: $(run) Hello World
np.template.hello.desc: Prints text — firmware call, breakpoint, infinite loop
np.template.hello.detail: Good starting point to understand a CPC project structure
np.template.empty.label: $(file) Empty
np.template.empty.desc: Just BANKSET/ORG/RUN skeleton and an infinite loop
np.template.cartridge.label: $(package) CPC+ Cartridge
np.template.cartridge.desc: CPC+ / GX4000 cartridge — BANK 0, ORG #C000, RASM -cpr output
np.template.cartridge.detail: Generates a .cpr ROM — requires a CPC+ / GX4000 emulator configuration
tmpl.built-with: Built with RASM — press F5 to build and debug.
tmpl.infinite-loop: Infinite loop (debugger stops here by default)
tmpl.cartridge.buildcpr: Tell RASM to produce a .cpr cartridge file
tmpl.cartridge.org.comment: Cartridge ROM entry point (CPC+ auto-starts here)
tmpl.cartridge.firmware.note: CPC+ firmware calls use the KL_ prefix and are at different addresses than CPC standard.
